_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis shows that the KSR1 protein was effectively knocked down in cells infected with lentiviruses encoding two different shRNA-KSR1 constructs
details: Effectively knocked down KSR1 protein in schwannoma cells when used with two different shRNA constructs (shRNA-A and shRNA-C)
